page_content:
For more information about the minor, please visit: http://start.umd.edu/ education/global-terrorism-studies-minor-program/.

Program Learning Outcomes 1. Students will be able to explain the history of terrorism,

characteristics of terrorist organizations, and the impact of terrorism on individuals, groups, and societies

2. Students will be able to explain the theories and frameworks

explaining terrorist motivations and behaviors

3. Students will be able to explain how topics related to diversity and
